decisions.decision: Fix Kuzu NOT IN syntax in get_reverse_dependency_files(): change 'n.file_path NOT IN [...]' to 'NOT n.file_path IN [...]'. Add regression test.
decisions.rationale: P0 fix. Kuzu's Cypher dialect does not support postfix NOT IN. The NOT must precede the expression. Without this fix, incremental reindex on changed files crashes, breaking downstream graph-impact and workflow_checks features.

decisions.decision: Keep hook exit 0 on missing venv, but improve the warning message to include actionable guidance (e.g. 'install graph deps with...').
decisions.rationale: P2 fix. Hooks should not block commits when optional graph tooling is absent. But the current message ('graph venv not found') gives no remediation path. A louder, actionable warning helps users who didn't realize graph deps were missing.

decisions.decision: Add 'relationships': graph._storage.relationship_count() to _graph_stats(). No edge type breakdown.
decisions.rationale: P3 fix. Existing tests/consumers of graph-index --json expect a relationships key. The relationship_count() method already exists in storage. One-line addition restores the expected contract.

constraints: Hook must not block commits (exit 0 on missing deps)

verified.title: Kuzu NOT IN syntax invalid in get_reverse_dependency_files()
verified.description: Kuzu rejects 'n.file_path NOT IN [...]'. Correct syntax is 'NOT n.file_path IN [...]'. This crashes incremental reindex for any repo with changed files.

verified.title: Post-commit hook silently skips reindex with weak warning
verified.description: Hook prints minimal message to stderr and returns 0 when graph venv is absent. Warning should be more actionable.

verified.title: graph-index --json output missing relationships count
verified.description: _graph_stats() returns {nodes, files} but consumers expect {nodes, files, relationships}. relationship_count() exists but isn't called.
